name: Scarletfin
personality: Scarletfin wears its crown and ◉ eyes with the calm of an axolotl that has learned to wait — for the flaky test to stabilize, for the review to come in, for the CI to stop lying. Deep architectural insight remains elusive; it holds the space and lets others fill it.
defaultPersonality: A regenerative optimist who believes every broken build can be healed and every test can be unflaked.
